items.title: Nick Richards Could Still Be on the Table for Knicks After Initial FA Rush
items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Nick Richards Could Still Be on the Table for Knicks After Initial FA Rush Sports Illustrated

items.title: “Vet” does not necessarily mean “old.” Nick Richards is 28. Marvin Bagley is 26. Hukporti and Bona are not proven NBA players, so it would be nice to have insurance.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: “Vet” does not necessarily mean “old.” Nick Richards is 28. Marvin Bagley is 26. Hukporti and Bona are not proven NBA players, so it would be nice to have insurance.
